name: trading-agents-workflow
description: Codex control-plane access for the trading-agents workflow registry, receipts, incidents, reconcile dry-runs, governance logs, and Git-managed workflow assets.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect workflow registry, receipts, incidents, logs, and Git state.
interface.longDescription: Provides local Codex with a governed MCP entrypoint for trading-agents-workflow readiness logs, runtime agent registry, receipts, message flows, incidents, reconcile dry-runs, server snapshots, and local Git status.
defaultPrompt: Compare workflow server state with Git.
